Kreedz_Cp_DisabledHere.pl-PL: {{green}}[KZ]{{default}} {{red}}Nie możesz ustawić checkpointu w tym miejscu.

Kreedz_Tip_1.en-US: {{green}}[Tip]{{default}} Set a checkpoint with {{lime}}!cp{{default}} and teleport back with {{lime}}!tp{{default}}. A run with 0 teleports is a {{gold}}PRO{{default}} time.

Kreedz_Tip_2.en-US: {{green}}[Tip]{{default}} Switch movement mode with {{lime}}!mode{{default}}. Stack styles like {{lime}}!abh{{default}} on top.

Kreedz_Tip_3.en-US: {{green}}[Tip]{{default}} {{lime}}!goto <player>{{default}} teleports you to someone. {{lime}}!measure{{default}} gets the distance between two points.

Kreedz_Tip_4.en-US: {{green}}[Tip]{{default}} Set your field of view with {{lime}}!fov <value>{{default}}, or a custom start with {{lime}}!setstartpos{{default}}.

Kreedz_Tip_5.en-US: {{green}}[Tip]{{default}} {{lime}}!undo{{default}} removes your last checkpoint; {{lime}}!prevcp{{default}} / {{lime}}!nextcp{{default}} cycle through them.

Kreedz_Goto_Running.en-US: {{green}}[KZ]{{default}} {{red}}Can't use !goto while the timer is running.
